caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing steady winds up to 21 knots with wave heights reaching 5.5 feet from the northeast. Rainfall probability is at 100%, indicating persistent heavy rain likely to affect port operations and marine conditions throughout the day.

mediterranean.headline: High Waves and Heavy Rain Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is facing hazardous marine conditions with sustained winds at 24 knots and significant wave heights reaching 11.5 feet from a southwest swell with a 10-second period. Rainfall probability is at 100 percent, creating challenging conditions for maritime operations and outdoor activities in the area.
